_schema.notes: Edit this file to add/update hotels. Fields: slug, name, city, area, image (relative path under /images/hotels/), alt (SEO alt text, required), link (affiliate URL), note (1-line editorial), price (optional display), tags (optional strings).
_schema.image_convention: Drop images into /images/hotels/ — filenames lowercase-kebab-case, .jpg preferred (or .webp).

hotels.name: The Venetian Resort Las Vegas
hotels.alt: The Venetian Resort Las Vegas all-suite tower and Grand Canal exterior on the mid-Strip
hotels.note: All-suite rooms, gondolas, and the Grand Canal — the easiest pick for a first Vegas weekend.

hotels.name: The Palazzo at The Venetian
hotels.alt: The Palazzo all-suite hotel tower at The Venetian complex on the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Quieter sister to the Venetian — same campus, newer rooms, bigger bathrooms.

hotels.name: Wynn Las Vegas
hotels.alt: Wynn Las Vegas bronze glass tower and porte cochere on the north end of the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Ask for a north-facing high floor — Sphere, Strip, and mountain views all in one room.

hotels.name: Encore at Wynn Las Vegas
hotels.alt: Encore at Wynn Las Vegas curved bronze tower glowing at dusk on the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: All-suite sister tower to Wynn — same pools, same restaurants, bigger rooms.

hotels.name: Bellagio
hotels.alt: Bellagio dancing fountains and Lake Como-style lagoon in front of the Bellagio tower at dusk
hotels.note: Request a fountain-view room and set an alarm for the 9pm show.

hotels.name: The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas
hotels.alt: The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas twin-tower facade and Chandelier Bar on the mid-Strip
hotels.note: Terrace suites with wraparound balconies — the only Strip rooms with real outdoor space.

hotels.name: ARIA Resort & Casino
hotels.alt: ARIA Resort & Casino CityCenter glass tower lit at night on the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Cleanest-looking rooms on the Strip — in-room tablets control everything.

hotels.name: Caesars Palace
hotels.alt: Caesars Palace Roman columned entrance and fountains on the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Ask for an Augustus Tower room — the only way to stay here without a long casino walk.

hotels.name: MGM Grand Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: MGM Grand Hotel & Casino emerald-green tower and lion statue on the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Walkable to T-Mobile Arena and Allegiant Stadium — best bet for Knights or Raiders weekends.

hotels.name: Mandalay Bay Resort And Casino
hotels.alt: Mandalay Bay Resort And Casino gold tower and beach-style pool on the south end of the Strip
hotels.note: The best pool on the Strip — a real sand beach and a wave pool.

hotels.name: Luxor Hotel and Casino
hotels.alt: Luxor Hotel and Casino black glass pyramid and Sphinx statue lit at night on the Strip
hotels.note: Ask for a Tower room, not a Pyramid — Pyramid rooms have slanted windows.

hotels.name: Excalibur Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Excalibur Hotel & Casino medieval castle towers at the south end of the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Cheapest walk-in deals on the Strip and an easy walk to the stadium.

hotels.name: Flamingo Las Vegas Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Flamingo Las Vegas Hotel & Casino pink neon sign and pool flamingos on the center Strip
hotels.note: Old-school center-Strip value — the Go Rooms are the only ones we recommend.

hotels.name: Rio Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Rio Hotel & Casino purple and red twin towers just west of the Strip in Las Vegas
hotels.note: Under a full rebrand — suite-only rooms, bigger than most Strip standards.

hotels.name: Treasure Island — TI Las Vegas
hotels.alt: Treasure Island TI Las Vegas Hotel & Casino pirate-themed facade on the central Strip
hotels.note: Underrated Strip value with a pedestrian bridge straight to Fashion Show Mall.

hotels.name: Crockfords Las Vegas, LXR Hotels & Resorts
hotels.alt: Crockfords Las Vegas LXR Hotels & Resorts hotel-within-a-hotel tower at Resorts World Las Vegas
hotels.note: The ultra-luxury Hilton inside Resorts World — butler service and a private pool.

hotels.name: Trump International Hotel Las Vegas
hotels.alt: Trump International Hotel Las Vegas gold glass tower just off the Strip near Fashion Show Mall
hotels.note: Non-gaming, non-smoking — quietest option steps off the Strip.

hotels.name: Jet Luxury at the Vdara Condo Hotel
hotels.alt: Vdara Condo Hotel curved glass tower at CityCenter between Bellagio and Aria
hotels.note: Non-gaming, all-suite, mid-Strip. Our top pick for travelers who hate casino smoke.

hotels.name: Jet Luxury Resorts at The Signature
hotels.alt: The Signature at MGM Grand all-suite tower connected by skybridge on the south Strip
hotels.note: One-bedroom suites with kitchens — great for longer stays.

hotels.name: Palms Casino Resort
hotels.alt: Palms Casino Resort twin towers off the Strip in Las Vegas lit at dusk
hotels.note: Huge rooms, great pool, and a free shuttle to the Strip — best overall off-Strip value.

hotels.name: Palms Place
hotels.alt: Palms Place all-suite tower adjacent to the Palms Casino Resort off the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: All-suite, non-gaming sister to Palms. Kitchens and a rooftop hot tub.

hotels.name: Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa
hotels.alt: Red Rock Casino Resort and Spa with the red sandstone cliffs of Red Rock Canyon in Summerlin
hotels.note: Where locals send their in-laws — canyon views, free parking, killer pool.

hotels.name: Durango Casino & Resort
hotels.alt: Durango Casino & Resort new-build tower in southwest Las Vegas near Red Rock Canyon
hotels.note: Newest resort in Vegas (2023) — bookable before the locals find out.

hotels.name: Aliante Casino & Hotel
hotels.alt: Aliante Casino & Hotel desert resort in North Las Vegas backed by the Sheep Range mountains
hotels.note: North Las Vegas — closest resort if you're flying into Raiders camp.

hotels.name: South Point Hotel
hotels.alt: South Point Hotel casino and equestrian center on the south end of Las Vegas Boulevard
hotels.note: Locals' favorite — sportsbook, bowling alley, equestrian arena, great buffet.

hotels.name: Westgate Flamingo Bay Resort
hotels.alt: Westgate Flamingo Bay Resort condo-style property just east of the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Condo-style suites, east of the Strip — good for longer stays or families.

hotels.name: Otonomus Hotel
hotels.alt: Otonomus Hotel AI-powered extended-stay boutique just off the Las Vegas Strip
hotels.note: Brand-new AI-powered boutique — bedrooms you book by the hour or night.

hotels.name: Green Valley Ranch Resort and Spa
hotels.alt: Green Valley Ranch Resort and Spa hilltop resort and pool in Henderson Nevada
hotels.note: Hilltop resort in Henderson — Strip skyline views and our favorite pool deck in town.

hotels.name: M Resort Spa Casino
hotels.alt: M Resort Spa Casino modern glass tower overlooking the Vegas Valley from Henderson
hotels.note: Hilltop Henderson property with the biggest rooms in the valley.

hotels.name: The Grand Hotel at the Grand Canyon
hotels.alt: The Grand Hotel at the Grand Canyon lodge-style entrance in Tusayan Arizona near the South Rim
hotels.note: Closest full-service hotel to the Grand Canyon South Rim entrance.

hotels.name: Grand Canyon Railway Hotel
hotels.alt: Grand Canyon Railway Hotel with vintage train depot in Williams Arizona on Historic Route 66
hotels.note: Take the train from Williams straight to the South Rim — the old-school way to see the Canyon.

hotels.name: Best Western Plus Inn of Williams
hotels.alt: Best Western Plus Inn of Williams Route 66 motel exterior in Williams Arizona
hotels.note: Walkable to downtown Williams — a solid value base for South Rim day trips.

hotels.name: Hampton Inn & Suites Kingman
hotels.alt: Hampton Inn & Suites Kingman Arizona on Historic Route 66
hotels.note: Reliable Route 66 stop — ideal halfway point between Vegas and the West Rim.

hotels.name: Best Western Plus A Wayfarer's Inn & Suites
hotels.alt: Best Western Plus A Wayfarer's Inn and Suites Kingman Arizona classic Route 66 motel
hotels.note: Cleanest Kingman option — heated pool, big breakfast.

hotels._comment: --- Placeholders for hotels NOT YET in your xlsx. Add the booking-link affiliate URLs and drop matching images into /images/hotels/. ---

hotels.name: CasaBlanca Resort and Casino
hotels.alt: CasaBlanca Resort and Casino palm-lined pool waterfall with rainbow arch in Mesquite Nevada
hotels.note: Mesquite's biggest all-in-one — 18-hole golf, full spa, palm-lined pool with a waterfall. The headline resort in town.

hotels.name: Eureka Casino Resort
hotels.alt: Eureka Casino Resort employee-owned resort in Mesquite Nevada with fireworks display at night
hotels.note: Employee-owned and it shows — friendliest service and most reliable rooms in Mesquite.

hotels.name: Virgin River Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Virgin River Hotel and Casino pool deck with palm trees in Mesquite Nevada
hotels.note: Best-value Mesquite stay — cheap rooms, decent pool, no-frills casino floor.

hotels.name: Holiday Inn Resort Mesquite by IHG
hotels.alt: Holiday Inn Resort Mesquite by IHG exterior and garden courtyard in Mesquite Nevada
hotels.note: The non-gaming option in town — garden courtyard, family-friendly, quiet nights.

hotels.name: Edgewater Hotel & Casino Resort
hotels.alt: Edgewater Hotel & Casino Resort riverside tower on the Colorado River in Laughlin Nevada
hotels.note: Colorado River views and a long sand beach right at the door.

hotels.name: The Aquarius Casino Resort, BW Premier Collection
hotels.alt: The Aquarius Casino Resort largest hotel on the Colorado River in Laughlin Nevada
hotels.note: Biggest hotel in Laughlin — easiest river-view room availability and best buffet on the strip.

hotels.name: Harrah's Laughlin
hotels.alt: Harrah's Laughlin Beach Resort and Casino private sand beach on the Colorado River in Nevada
hotels.note: The only real private beach in Laughlin — Caesars Rewards destination.

hotels.name: Tropicana Laughlin
hotels.alt: Tropicana Laughlin green and white riverfront hotel and casino on the Colorado River in Nevada
hotels.note: Renovated rooms, the best locals' restaurant on the river, and Caesars Rewards.

hotels.name: Fremont Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Fremont Hotel & Casino under the neon canopy of the Fremont Street Experience in downtown Las Vegas
hotels.note: Cheapest downtown option right under the neon canopy — Second Street Grill is a local favorite.

hotels.name: Plaza Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Plaza Hotel & Casino classic downtown Las Vegas casino at the head of Fremont Street
hotels.note: Anchor of Fremont Street — rooftop pool with downtown skyline views and Oscar's Steakhouse.

hotels.name: Golden Nugget Las Vegas Hotel & Casino
hotels.alt: Golden Nugget Las Vegas Rush Tower and The Tank shark aquarium pool on Fremont Street downtown
hotels.note: The nicest rooms downtown — The Tank pool has a three-story shark tank water slide through it.
